There is insufficient amount of glaze atm. I need more.

On Pearl Keiko got more kills in a single half than the rest of the lobby -mada got in the entire series

On Lotus Keiko got more kills than anybody else did across the ENTIRE series
On Lotus Keiko got more kills in either half than anyone on NRG did the entire map
On Lotus Keiko got more kills than his next 2 teammates

Keiko is the GOAT and will be Masters London mvp
